notice-board.title: The Rocks
notice-board.subtitle: About Nuu
lines: Nuu (нүү) — the verb shatar players use when they make their move.
We are a community of Mongolian builders, breakers, and shippers — scattered across the world, gathered here by the harbour.
Drop your move on the Discord. Then make the next one.

pavilion.title: Circular Quay
pavilion.subtitle: Upcoming events
lines: All RSVP from the events list below the world.

bookshelf.title: State Library
bookshelf.subtitle: Library
lines: Essays and primers on the shelf — a shatar guide, diaspora notes, and more from the community.
Members can write their own. Submit a draft and an editor will publish it.

portal.title: Manly Ferry
portal.subtitle: to Discord
lines: Catch the ferry across to the Discord.
First move you make: introduce yourself in #intros.

salon.title: Bondi
salon.subtitle: Your character
lines: Pick your character — choose a look you like from the lineup.
Saved on this device for now.
